extra.message: User input from the 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a string that is passed to Jinja2.from_string(). The unsanitized username variable is embedded in the template string, allowing Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI). An attacker can inject Jinja2 template expressions (e.g., {{7*7}} or {{__import__('os').system('command')}}) to execute arbitrary code on the server.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code (Code Injection)
